meaning: n.[鐢熷寲] 涔宠泲鐧借川
examples: The MC1R gene is related to coat color in cattle and to lactoprotein content in milk.
Lactoprotein was an important source of bioactive peptides besides a nutritional substance.
Lactoprotein hydrolysate could speed up the growth of test - tube - seedlings and increase buds differentiation.
